title: Legislators
exposure_rationale: Legislators engage in a mix of cognitive tasks such as planning, organizing, and evaluating, which can be supported by AI tools for data analysis and decision-making. However, the role heavily relies on interpersonal skills, political acumen, and human judgment, limiting the extent to which AI can fully replace or reshape the core functions of the job.

title: Senior government managers and officials
education_req: A university degree or college diploma is usually required.
A graduate degree in a related field may be required.
Several years of managerial experience in the public or private sector are required.
exposure_rationale: Senior government managers and officials engage in a blend of strategic planning, decision-making, and interpersonal communication, which involves significant cognitive work. While AI can assist in data analysis and reporting, the role's reliance on human judgment, leadership, and complex stakeholder interactions limits the extent of AI's impact on core tasks.

title: Senior managers - financial, communications and other business services
education_req: A university degree in business administration, commerce, computer science or other discipline related to the service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in financial, communications or other business services are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or service is possible through specific university training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in financial, communications, and other business services engage in a blend of strategic planning, decision-making, and interpersonal communication, which involves both knowledge work and human judgment. While AI can assist with data analysis and reporting, the core tasks of leadership, relationship management, and organizational strategy still require significant human presence and insight, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Senior managers - health, education, social and community services and membership organizations
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, hospital administration, finance or other discipline related to the service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in a related institution or organization are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or service is possible through specific university or college training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in health, education, and social services engage in significant cognitive tasks such as planning, organizing, and evaluating, which can be enhanced by AI tools. However, their roles also require interpersonal skills and human judgment, limiting the extent to which AI can fully automate their responsibilities.

title: Senior managers - trade, broadcasting and other services
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, finance or other discipline related to the service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in trade, broadcasting or other service are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or service is possible through specific university or college training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in trade, broadcasting, and other services engage in a blend of strategic planning, decision-making, and interpersonal communication, which are essential for their roles. While AI can assist with data analysis and operational efficiencies, the core tasks still require significant human judgment and relationship management, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Senior managers - construction, transportation, production and utilities
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in engineering, business administration, commerce or other discipline related to the company's product is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in goods production, utilities, transportation or construction are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or product is possible through specific university or college training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in construction, transportation, production, and utilities engage in a blend of strategic planning and interpersonal communication, which limits the extent to which AI can fully automate their roles. While AI can assist with data analysis and decision-making processes, the need for human judgment, relationship management, and on-site presence in these industries keeps the cognitive AI exposure at a moderate level.

title: Financial managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in business administration, economics, commerce or a related field is required.
A master's degree in business administration (concentration in finance), or another master's level management program may be required.
Several years of experience in accounting, auditing, budgeting, financial planning and analysis or other financial activities are required.
exposure_rationale: Financial managers engage in significant knowledge work, including planning, organizing, and evaluating financial strategies, which can be enhanced by AI tools for data analysis and decision-making. While their roles require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the increasing use of AI for financial modeling and reporting suggests a high potential for productivity gains and restructuring in this occupation.

title: Human resources managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in a field related to personnel management, such as business administration, industrial relations, commerce or psychology or completion of a professional development program in personnel administration is required.
Several years of experience as a personnel officer or human resource specialist are required.
Some employers may require human resources managers to hold a Certified Human Resources Professional (CHRP) designation.
exposure_rationale: Human resources managers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as planning, organizing, and evaluating HR functions. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and relationship management, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Purchasing managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce or economics is usually required.

Purchasing managers responsible for units purchasing specialized materials or business services may require a related degree or diploma. For example, a bachelor's degree or college diploma in engineering may be required for purchasing managers responsible for purchasing industrial products.
The designation Supply Chain Management Professional (SCMP) or registration in the educational program of the Supply Chain Management Association may be required.
exposure_rationale: Purchasing managers engage in a blend of cognitive tasks such as planning, organizing, and evaluating, which can be supported by AI tools for data analysis and decision-making. However, the role also requires interpersonal skills and human judgment in negotiations and supplier relationships, limiting the extent to which AI can fully automate these functions.

title: Other administrative services managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration or a related administrative services field is usually required.
Several years of experience at a professional level in business administration, finance or administrative services are usually required.

An Associate of the Institute of the Chartered Secretaries and Administrators (ACIS), Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Secretaries and Administrators (FCIS) or a Professional Administrator (P Adm) designation may be required for some occupations in this group.
exposure_rationale: Other administrative services managers engage in a blend of management tasks that include planning, organizing, and evaluating, which involve both cognitive and interpersonal skills. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and relationship management, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Insurance, real estate and financial brokerage managers
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, economics or other related field is usually required.
Several years of experience within the appropriate industry are usually required.
Licensure appropriate to the service sold, such as real estate, mortgage, securities or insurance, may be required.
exposure_rationale: Insurance, real estate, and financial brokerage managers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, requiring human judgment and relationship management. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core responsibilities of planning, directing, and evaluating business operations still necessitate significant human involvement, resulting in a moderate AI exposure score.

title: Banking, credit and other investment managers
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce, economics or a related field is usually required.
A master's degree in business administration, finance or management science may be required for the management of large commercial loans.
A recognized financial designation may be required (CFA, CFP, CIM or others).
exposure_rationale: Banking, credit, and other investment managers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves planning, organizing, and evaluating financial strategies, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools for data analysis and decision-making. However, the role still requires human judgment and interpersonal skills, particularly in client relations and complex decision-making, which limits the overall AI exposure.

title: Advertising, marketing and public relations managers
education_req: Advertising and public relations managers

A university degree or college diploma in communications, public relations, marketing, journalism or in a related field and several years of experience in an advertising, public relations or communications officer position or in a related occupation are required.
Marketing managers
exposure_rationale: Advertising, marketing, and public relations managers engage in significant knowledge work, including planning, strategizing, and evaluating campaigns, which can be enhanced by AI tools for data analysis and content generation. However, the need for human judgment, creativity, and interpersonal relationships in these roles limits the extent to which AI can fully replace their cognitive tasks.

title: Other business services managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in a field related to the business service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience in a field related to the business service provided are usually required.
Licences, certificates or registration may be required for some business services managers. For example, accounting firm managers usually require accounting certification.
exposure_rationale: Other business services managers engage in a blend of cognitive tasks such as planning, organizing, and evaluating, which can be supported by AI tools for data analysis and decision-making. However, the role still requires significant human judgment and interpersonal skills, limiting the extent to which AI can fully automate or replace these functions.

title: Telecommunication carriers managers
education_req: A university degree in science, electrical engineering or a related field is usually required.
Several years of experience in a related technical profession, including supervisory experience, are usually required.
exposure_rationale: Telecommunication carriers managers engage in a blend of management and strategic planning tasks that involve significant information processing and decision-making. While much of their work is digital and can be enhanced by AI tools for data analysis and operational efficiency, the role still requires human judgment, interpersonal skills, and oversight of complex systems, limiting the overall AI exposure.

title: Financial auditors and accountants
education_req: Chartered professional accountants, chartered accountants (CPA, CA) require a university degree and completion of a professional training program approved by a provincial Institute of Chartered Accountants and, depending on the province, either two years or 30 months of on-the-job training and membership in a provincial Institute of Chartered Accountants upon successful completion of the Uniform Evaluation (UFE).

Chartered professional accountants, certified general accountants (CPA, CGA) and chartered professional accountants, certified management accountants (CPA, CMA) require a university degree and completion of an approved training program and several years of on-the-job training and certification with a regulatory body is required in all provinces and territories.

Auditors require education, training and recognition as indicated for chartered professional accountants, chartered accountants (CPA, CA), chartered professional accountants, certified general accountants (CPA, CGA) or chartered professional accountants, certified management accountants (CPA, CMA) and some experience as an accountant.
exposure_rationale: Financial auditors and accountants primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing financial data, preparing reports, and ensuring compliance with regulations, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and interpersonal skills are still essential, especially in client interactions and complex decision-making, the increasing capabilities of AI in data analysis and reporting suggest a high level of cognitive AI exposure.

title: Financial and investment analysts
education_req: A bachelor's degree in commerce, business administration, accounting, finance or economics and on-the-job training and industry courses and programs are usually required.
A master's degree in business administration (MBA) (concentration in finance) or in finance may be required.
The Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation, available through a program conducted by the CFA Institute or an other recognized financial designations (CFP, CIM or others), is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Financial and investment analysts primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing data, creating reports, and providing insights, which are tasks increasingly supported by AI tools. While human judgment and relationship management are still crucial, the cognitive aspects of the role are significantly enhanced by AI, leading to higher productivity and potential restructuring of the occupation.

title: Financial advisors
education_req: A bachelor's degree in business administration, commerce, economics or a related field is usually required.
The designation Certified Financial Planner, awarded by the Financial Planners Standards Council of Canada, may be required.
To sell regulated financial products and investments, such as annuities, RRSPs and life insurance, a licence is required from the appropriate governing body.
exposure_rationale: Financial advisors primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing financial data, advising clients, and developing financial plans, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and relationship-building are crucial in this role, AI can assist in data analysis and client communication, leading to increased productivity and potential job restructuring.

title: Securities agents, investment dealers and brokers
education_req: A bachelor's or master's degree in economics, business or other discipline is usually required.
A recognized financial designation may be required (CFA, CFP, CIM or others).

Securities sales representatives and brokers require completion of industry investment and sales training programs and completion of licensing courses such as the Canadian Securities Course and the Conduct and Practices Handbook Course offered by the Canadian Securities Institute, or acceptable alternatives such as completion of one or more levels of the CFA Program, offered by CFA Institute.
exposure_rationale: Securities agents, investment dealers, and brokers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing financial data, communicating with clients, and making investment decisions. While AI can assist with data analysis and client communication, the need for human judgment and relationship management in financial advising limits the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Other financial officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in business administration, commerce, economics or a related field is usually required.

Various training programs and courses are offered by financial institutes and organizations, such as the Canadian Securities Institute, Institute of Canadian Bankers, CFA Institute, Investment Funds Institute and Trust Companies Institute of Canada, and may be required by employers.
A recognized financial designation may be required (CFA, CIM or others).
exposure_rationale: Other financial officers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as financial analysis, reporting, and administrative support. While AI can assist with data processing and analysis, the need for human judgment and relationship management in finance limits the extent of cognitive AI exposure, resulting in a moderate score.

title: Human resources professionals
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in human resources management or a related field, such as business administration, industrial relations, commerce or psychology or completion of a professional development program in human resources administration is required.
Some employers may require human resources professionals to hold a Certified Human Resources Professional (CHRP) designation.
exposure_rationale: Human resources professionals engage in a significant amount of knowledge work, including recruitment, employee relations, and policy development, which can be enhanced by AI tools for data analysis and communication. While interpersonal skills and human judgment are crucial in this role, AI can streamline many administrative and analytical tasks, leading to increased productivity and potential restructuring of the workforce.

title: Professional occupations in business management consulting
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce or a related discipline is usually required.
A graduate degree in business administration may be required.
Some establishments may require management consultants to be certified by a provincial management consulting association.
exposure_rationale: Professional occupations in business management consulting involve significant cognitive tasks such as analyzing data, developing strategies, and advising clients, which are increasingly supported by AI tools. While interpersonal skills and human judgment are essential, the digital nature of much of the work means that AI can enhance productivity and reshape how consultants operate, leading to a moderate to high exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Professional occupations in advertising, marketing and public relations
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business marketing, public relations, communications, journalism, museology or a discipline related to a particular subject matter is usually required.
Practitioners in public relations may require an APR (Accredited in Public Relations) designation.
exposure_rationale: Occupations in advertising, marketing, and public relations involve significant cognitive tasks such as strategy development, content creation, and data analysis, which are increasingly supported by AI tools. While human judgment and creativity remain crucial, the digital nature of much of the work means that AI can enhance productivity and reshape workflows, leading to a high level of exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Supervisors, general office and administrative support workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Completion of college courses related to area supervised is usually required.
Experience in the occupation supervised is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Supervisors in office and administrative support roles primarily engage in knowledge work that involves managing tasks, coordinating activities, and overseeing staff, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While there is a degree of interpersonal interaction and human judgment required, the cognitive tasks such as scheduling, reporting, and data analysis are increasingly being automated, indicating a high level of AI exposure.

title: Supervisors, finance and insurance office workers
education_req: Completion of a college program or courses in bookkeeping, accounting or a related subject is required.
Experience in the clerical occupation supervised is required.
exposure_rationale: Supervisors in finance and insurance office roles primarily engage in knowledge work, overseeing tasks such as financial analysis, reporting, and administrative support, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While there is a degree of interpersonal interaction and human judgment required, the cognitive aspects of the job are increasingly susceptible to AI-driven productivity improvements, justifying a moderate to high exposure score.

title: Supervisors, library, correspondence and related information workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Completion of college courses related to area supervised may be required.
Experience in the clerical occupation supervised is usually required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a blend of supervisory and administrative tasks that include managing information and correspondence, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While AI can assist in automating certain clerical tasks and data management, the role still requires significant human judgment and interpersonal skills, limiting its overall exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Supervisors, supply chain, tracking and scheduling coordination occupations
education_req: Completion of a post-secondary education program of two to three years in business, supply chain, production or manufacturing management and related is usually required.
Several years of experience in the occupation supervised are usually required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves significant cognitive tasks such as coordinating schedules, managing supply chains, and overseeing administrative functions, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While there is a need for human judgment and interpersonal skills, the reliance on digital processes for tracking and scheduling indicates a high potential for AI to improve productivity and reshape workflows.

title: Executive assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A bachelor's degree in public administration, political science or a related discipline is usually required.
Experience in a related administrative occupation is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Executive assistants primarily engage in knowledge work that involves managing schedules, communication, and documentation, which are increasingly supported by AI tools. While their roles require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the digital nature of their tasks means that AI can significantly enhance productivity and efficiency, leading to a moderate to high exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Human resources and recruitment officers
education_req: A college diploma in a field related to personnel management such as business administration, industrial relations, commerce or completion of a professional development program in personnel administration is usually required.
Certification as a Certified Human Resources Professional (CHRP) may be required.
Some experience in a clerical or administrative position related to personnel administration may be required.
exposure_rationale: Human resources and recruitment officers engage in a significant amount of knowledge work, including analyzing resumes, conducting interviews, and managing employee relations, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While interpersonal skills and human judgment are crucial in recruitment processes, AI can assist in streamlining administrative tasks and improving productivity, indicating a high level of cognitive AI exposure.

title: Procurement and purchasing agents and officers
education_req: Procurement and purchasing agents and officers usually require a bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce or economics.

Procurement and purchasing agents and officers purchasing specialized materials or business services may require a related university degree or college diploma. For example, a bachelor's degree or college diploma in engineering may be required for purchasers of industrial products.
A certificate in purchasing from the Purchasing Management Association of Canada (PMAC) may be required.
exposure_rationale: Procurement and purchasing agents and officers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing data, negotiating contracts, and managing supplier relationships, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While some interpersonal skills and judgment are required, the digital nature of their tasks means that AI can streamline processes, improve decision-making, and increase productivity, leading to a moderate to high exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Conference and event planners
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business, tourism or hospitality administration is usually required.
Several years of experience in hospitality or tourism administration or in public relations are usually required and may substitute for formal education requirements.
Certification relating to special events, meetings or conference management may be required.
exposure_rationale: Conference and event planners engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as coordinating logistics, managing client relationships, and ensuring successful event execution. While AI can assist with scheduling and data management, the role heavily relies on human judgment, creativity, and personal interactions, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Employment insurance and revenue officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma is usually required.
Several years of related administrative or regulatory experience may be required.
Completion of specialized government training is required.
exposure_rationale: Employment insurance and revenue officers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing financial data, processing claims, and communicating with clients, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While there is a degree of interpersonal interaction and judgment required, the core tasks are predominantly digital, making this occupation susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and potential restructuring.

title: Court reporters, medical transcriptionists and related occupations
education_req: Court reporters require completion of secondary school.
Completion of a college or other program in court reporting is usually required and the Chartered Shorthand Reporter (CSR) certificate may be required for court reporters.
Medical transcriptionists require completion of secondary school.
exposure_rationale: Court reporters and medical transcriptionists primarily engage in digital information processing, such as transcribing spoken language into written text. While their work is heavily reliant on cognitive tasks that can be enhanced by AI, the need for human judgment and accuracy in legal and medical contexts still requires a significant human presence, limiting full automation.

title: Health information management occupations
education_req: Health information management technicians and related workers require completion of a recognized two-year college diploma program in health record technology or health information management.

Health information management technicians and related workers are eligible to write the Canadian Health Information Management Association national certification examination which may be required by employers.
exposure_rationale: Health information management occupations involve a blend of knowledge work and administrative tasks, including data analysis and management of health records. While AI can assist with data processing and administrative functions, a significant portion of the work still requires human judgment and interpersonal skills, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Records management technicians
education_req: Records management technicians usually require completion of a two- to three-year college program in information or records management technology.
Two to three years' experience in a records management environment may be required.
exposure_rationale: Records management technicians engage in a blend of knowledge work and clerical tasks, which includes organizing, maintaining, and retrieving records, often using digital systems. While AI can assist in automating some of these information-processing tasks, the role still requires human judgment and oversight, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Statistical officers and related research support occupations
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A college diploma or undergraduate degree in a social science, commerce, statistics or a related field is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Statistical officers and related research support occupations involve significant data analysis, reporting, and administrative tasks that can be enhanced by AI tools. While these roles require human judgment and interpretation, the increasing capabilities of AI in data processing and analysis suggest a high potential for productivity gains, making the occupation moderately exposed to cognitive AI advancements.

title: Accounting technicians and bookkeepers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.

Completion of a college program in accounting, bookkeeping or a related field or completion of two years (first level) of a recognized professional accounting program (e.g., Chartered Accounting, Certified General Accounting) or courses in accounting or bookkeeping combined with several years of experience as a financial or accounting clerk are required.
exposure_rationale: Accounting technicians and bookkeepers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves financial data processing, reporting, and analysis, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While some tasks require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the digital nature of their work means that AI can automate many routine aspects, leading to increased productivity and potential restructuring of the occupation.

title: Insurance adjusters and claims examiners
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A bachelor's degree, college diploma or some post-secondary education or several years of experience as a clerk in the claims department or other general insurance experience is required.
Several years of on-the-job training and completion of insurance industry courses and training programs are required.
exposure_rationale: Insurance adjusters and claims examiners primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing claims, assessing damages, and communicating with clients, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and interpersonal skills are essential for certain aspects of the job, the cognitive tasks involved are increasingly amenable to automation, leading to high productivity gains through AI assistance.

title: Insurance underwriters
education_req: Completion of secondary school and some general insurance experience or a bachelor's degree, college diploma or some post-secondary education is required.
Several years of on-the-job training and completion of insurance industry underwriting courses and training programs are required.
exposure_rationale: Insurance underwriters primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing data, assessing risks, and making decisions based on information. While there is a significant cognitive component that could be enhanced by AI tools, the need for human judgment and the complexity of risk assessment limit the extent of AI's impact, resulting in a high but not maximum exposure.

title: Assessors, business valuators and appraisers
education_req: Assessors require a college diploma in municipal assessment and accreditation with the municipal assessment association of the province.

Business valuators usually require a bachelor's degree or college diploma in accounting, business or commerce and accreditation with the Canadian Institute of Chartered Business Valuators based on successful completion of its business and security valuation program.
Appraisers require a college diploma or vocational training in the field of appraisal or several years of experience in a position related to the field of appraisal.
exposure_rationale: Assessors, business valuators, and appraisers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, such as analyzing financial data and communicating with clients. While AI can assist in data analysis and valuation processes, the need for human judgment and relationship-building in appraisals limits the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Administrative officers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A university degree or college diploma in business or public administration may be required.
Experience in a senior clerical or executive secretarial position related to office administration is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Administrative officers primarily engage in knowledge work involving tasks such as managing information, coordinating activities, and supporting business operations, which are increasingly being assisted by AI tools. While there is a significant cognitive component to their roles, the need for human judgment and interpersonal skills in areas like human resources and business administration limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Property administrators
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required in all provinces and territories except for British Columbia.
A language proficiency index is required in British Columbia.
Property administrators must be a minimum of nineteen years of age in British Columbia.
exposure_rationale: Property administrators engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as managing property operations, handling tenant relations, and overseeing financial aspects. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and relationship management, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Payroll administrators
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of college or other courses in accounting, bookkeeping or payroll administration or experience in payroll administration is usually required.
Payroll association certification may be required.
exposure_rationale: Payroll administrators engage in a blend of knowledge work and clerical tasks, which includes processing payroll, managing employee records, and ensuring compliance with regulations. While AI can assist in automating some of these information-processing tasks, the role still requires human judgment and oversight, particularly in handling complex payroll issues and interpersonal communication with employees.

title: Administrative assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a one- or two-year college or other program for administrative assistants or secretaries or previous clerical experience is required.
exposure_rationale: Administrative assistants primarily engage in knowledge work that involves managing information, scheduling, and communication, which are increasingly being supported by AI tools. While some tasks require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the digital nature of their work allows for significant productivity gains through AI, indicating a high level of exposure to cognitive AI advancements.

title: Legal administrative assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a one- or two-year college or other program for secretaries or legal secretaries is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Legal administrative assistants engage in a blend of clerical and knowledge work, including document preparation, scheduling, and communication, which can be assisted by AI tools. While AI can enhance productivity in these tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and interpersonal skills, limiting its overall exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Medical administrative assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a one- or two-year college program or other specialized courses for secretaries or medical secretaries is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Medical administrative assistants engage in a blend of clerical and interpersonal tasks, such as scheduling appointments, managing patient records, and communicating with healthcare professionals. While AI can assist with information processing and administrative tasks, the role still requires significant human interaction and judgment, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Customs, ship and other brokers
education_req: Completion of secondary school and some post-secondary education in commerce or a related field is required
Customs brokers require several years of on-the-job training and completion of a customs brokers training program through the International Federation of Customs Brokers Association.
A customs broker licence, issued by the Canada Border Services Agency, is required for an individual or company to operate a customs brokerage business.
exposure_rationale: Customs, ship and other brokers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal communication, often requiring human judgment in navigating regulations and client relationships. While AI can assist with data processing and compliance checks, the need for human oversight and negotiation limits the overall cognitive AI exposure of this occupation.

title: Production and transportation logistics coordinators
education_req: Completion of a post-secondary education program of less than two years in Business or Supply Chain Management or extensive experience as a dispatcher, production clerk or scheduling clerk is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Production and transportation logistics coordinators engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as coordinating logistics and managing supply chains. While AI can assist with data analysis and scheduling, the role still requires significant human judgment and relationship management, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: General office support workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of secondary school or college business or commercial courses is usually required.
exposure_rationale: General office support workers primarily engage in knowledge work involving tasks such as data entry, scheduling, and communication, which are increasingly being supported by AI tools. While there is a need for human judgment and interpersonal skills, the digital nature of their work means that AI can significantly enhance productivity, leading to a moderate to high exposure to cognitive AI advancements.

title: Receptionists
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
On-the-job training may be provided.
exposure_rationale: Receptionists perform a blend of administrative tasks that involve both interpersonal communication and some information processing. While AI can assist with scheduling and basic inquiries, the role still requires significant human interaction and judgment, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Personnel clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of college or other courses in personnel administration may be required.
Some clerical experience may be required.
exposure_rationale: Personnel clerks engage in a blend of administrative and knowledge work, including tasks like managing employee records, processing payroll, and assisting with recruitment. While AI can assist with data management and routine tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and interpersonal skills, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Court clerks and related court services occupations
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
On-the-job training is provided for court officers, court clerks, and court liaison officers.
Special Constable Certification may be required for court officers and court liaison officers.
exposure_rationale: Court clerks engage in a blend of administrative and knowledge work, including document management, scheduling, and communication, which can be assisted by AI tools. However, the role still requires significant human judgment and interpersonal skills, particularly in legal contexts, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Survey interviewers and statistical clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school may be required.
Experience in the operation of a computer may be required.
On-the-job training is usually provided.
exposure_rationale: Survey interviewers and statistical clerks engage in a mix of knowledge work and clerical tasks, which can be supported by AI tools for data analysis and survey processing. However, the role still requires significant human interaction and judgment, particularly in conducting interviews and interpreting qualitative data, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Data entry clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school may be required.
College or other courses in data entry may be required.
exposure_rationale: Data entry clerks perform routine information processing tasks that are fully digital and can be automated by AI technologies. The nature of their work, which involves data input and management, makes them highly susceptible to cognitive AI advancements, as AI can already perform most of these tasks efficiently.

title: Desktop publishing operators and related occupations
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Completion of a college program in graphic arts, or other training in typography, computer typesetting or desktop publishing, is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Desktop publishing operators primarily engage in knowledge work that involves digital tools for creating and formatting documents, which positions them for significant AI exposure. While some tasks may require human judgment and creativity, the core functions are heavily reliant on digital processes, making them susceptible to productivity gains from AI advancements.

title: Accounting and related clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.

title: Aircraft instrument, electrical and avionics mechanics, technicians and inspectors

title: Managers in health care

title: Specialists in surgery
exposure_rationale: Specialists in surgery primarily engage in hands-on, physical tasks that require a high level of skill and human judgment, making them less susceptible to cognitive AI exposure. title: Dentists
exposure_rationale: Dentists primarily engage in hands-on, physical work that requires direct patient interaction and manual dexterity, which limits the impact of cognitive AI on their core tasks. title: Optometrists

title: Pharmacists

exposure_rationale: Chiropractors primarily engage in hands-on physical treatment and patient interaction, which limits the impact of cognitive AI on their core tasks. title: Physiotherapists
exposure_rationale: Physiotherapists primarily engage in hands-on, interpersonal work that involves diagnosing and treating patients, which limits the impact of cognitive AI. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or data management, the core functions of this occupation require human presence and physical interaction, resulting in low AI exposure.

education_req: Dental assistants require completion of an eight-month to one-year college or other program in dental assistance or completion of secondary school with on-the-job training.
Registration with a regulatory body is required in all provinces except Quebec and Ontario.

Certification by the National Dental Assisting Examination Board is required to perform intra-oral duties in all provinces except in Quebec, where intra-oral duties are not performed by dental assistants.
exposure_rationale: Dental assistants and dental laboratory assistants primarily engage in physical and interpersonal tasks, such as assisting with dental procedures and preparing materials, which limits the impact of cognitive AI. While AI may assist with scheduling or minor administrative tasks, the core responsibilities of patient interaction and hands-on work remain largely unaffected by AI advancements.

title: Medical laboratory assistants and related technical occupations
education_req: Medical laboratory assistants and related technical workers require completion of a college certificate program in medical laboratory science.
Certification by the Canadian Society for Medical Laboratory Science is usually required by employers.
exposure_rationale: Medical laboratory assistants perform a blend of technical and interpersonal tasks, including processing samples and assisting in diagnostic procedures. While AI may assist in data analysis and laboratory management, the occupation still requires significant human presence and judgment, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Nurse aides, orderlies and patient service associates
education_req: Some secondary school education and on-the-job training or a personal support worker, nursing aide or health care aide college or private institutional program, or a college nursing orderly program and supervised practical training are required.
Completion of specialized courses such as cardiopulmonary resuscitation (CPR) and first aid is usually required.
An appropriate class of driver's licence may be required for medical attendants.
exposure_rationale: Nurse aides, orderlies, and patient service associates primarily engage in physical and interpersonal tasks, such as providing direct patient care and assistance. While AI may assist with scheduling or documentation, the core responsibilities of this occupation require human presence and empathy, limiting the impact of cognitive AI on their daily work.

title: Pharmacy technical assistants and pharmacy assistants
education_req: Pharmacy technical assistants usually require completion of up to two-years of a Pharmacy Technical Assistance vocational program.
Pharmacy assistants usually require completion of a Pharmacy Assistant college program, ranging from six to twelve months or completion of secondary school and several months of on-the-job training.
exposure_rationale: Pharmacy technical assistants and pharmacy assistants engage in a blend of physical and knowledge work, including tasks like medication preparation and patient interaction. While AI may assist with information processing and inventory management, the role still requires significant human presence and interpersonal skills, limiting overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Other assisting occupations in support of health services
education_req: Audiometric technicians usually require a specialization in industrial audiometry testing.
Orthopedic technologists usually require completion of secondary school and several months of on-the-job training or a college orthopedic technologist program.
Registration with the Canadian Society of Orthopaedic Technologists is available and may be required by employers.
exposure_rationale: This occupation primarily involves interpersonal work and direct patient care, which limits the impact of cognitive AI on core tasks. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or data management, the essential functions of diagnosing and treating patients require human presence and judgment, resulting in a low to moderate exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Government managers - health and social policy development and program administration
education_req: Government managers in health policy development and program administration
A bachelor's degree or college diploma in health science, hospital administration or public administration or a bachelor's degree in social science is required.
A graduate degree in a health, social science or an administrative discipline may be required.
exposure_rationale: Government managers in health and social policy development primarily engage in strategic planning, program administration, and policy analysis, which involve significant cognitive work. While AI can assist in data analysis and administrative tasks, the role still requires human judgment, interpersonal skills, and a physical presence for stakeholder engagement, limiting overall AI exposure.

title: Government managers - economic analysis, policy development and program administration
education_req: A bachelor's degree in economics, business administration, commerce or public administration is required.
A master's degree in economics or a related field may be required.
Several years of experience as an economist, economic development officer or socio-economic researcher are required.
exposure_rationale: Government managers in economic analysis, policy development, and program administration engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks. While AI can assist with data analysis and report generation, the role still requires significant human judgment, relationship management, and contextual understanding, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Government managers - education policy development and program administration
education_req: A bachelor's degree in education is required.
A master's degree in a particular educational specialization may be required.
Several years of combined experience as a school teacher and as a government educational policy researcher, consultant or program officer are usually required.
exposure_rationale: Government managers in education policy development and program administration engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as policy analysis, stakeholder engagement, and program oversight. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the need for human judgment, relationship-building, and nuanced decision-making in policy development limits the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Other managers in public administration
education_req: A bachelor's degree in a social science discipline, law or business administration is required.

Several years of experience in government policy development, research or program administration, or in a professional occupation in social science, law or business administration are usually required.
exposure_rationale: The role of other managers in public administration involves a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as overseeing community services and managing teams. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the need for human judgment, relationship management, and physical presence in community engagement limits the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Administrators - post-secondary education and vocational training
education_req: Faculty administrators require a graduate degree in a field related to the academic faculty and several years of experience as a university professor or college teacher.
Registrars require an undergraduate degree in business administration or a related field and several years of experience in registration administration.
Administrators of vocational training schools usually require an undergraduate degree in business administration or expertise and certification in a subject of instruction.
exposure_rationale: The role of administrators in post-secondary education and vocational training involves a blend of administrative tasks and interpersonal interactions, such as managing student records, coordinating programs, and supporting faculty. While AI can assist with data management and scheduling, the job still requires significant human presence and judgment, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: School principals and administrators of elementary and secondary education
education_req: A bachelor's degree in education is required.
A master's degree in education may be required.
Several years of experience as a senior teacher or department head are required.
exposure_rationale: School principals and administrators primarily engage in interpersonal work, leadership, and decision-making, which require human judgment and presence. While AI can assist with administrative tasks and data analysis, the core responsibilities involve managing staff, interacting with students and parents, and ensuring educational quality, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Managers in social, community and correctional services
education_req: Managers in social, community and correctional services usually require a master's degree in a social science or administrative discipline and several years of experience in a related occupation, such as a community and social service worker, social or health policy researcher, consultant or program officer, probation or parole officer, or social worker.
Managers of associations and membership organizations require extensive experience in a related occupation, trade or industry.
exposure_rationale: Managers in social, community, and correctional services engage in a blend of interpersonal and knowledge work, requiring significant human judgment and relationship-building. While AI can assist with data management and administrative tasks, the core responsibilities involve direct human interaction and decision-making, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Commissioned police officers and related occupations in public protection services
exposure_rationale: Commissioned police officers primarily engage in physical and interpersonal work, such as law enforcement, community engagement, and crisis intervention, which limits the impact of cognitive AI. While AI may assist with administrative tasks and data analysis, the core responsibilities of maintaining public safety and human interaction remain largely unaffected by AI advancements.

title: Fire chiefs and senior firefighting officers
exposure_rationale: Fire chiefs and senior firefighting officers primarily engage in physical and interpersonal work, overseeing firefighting operations and managing teams. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or data analysis, the core responsibilities of leadership, decision-making in emergencies, and community interaction limit the exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Commissioned officers of the Canadian Armed Forces
education_req: A university degree is usually required.
Completion of military training is required.
Experience as a non-commissioned member of the armed forces and demonstrated leadership ability may substitute for a university degree.
exposure_rationale: Commissioned officers of the Canadian Armed Forces primarily engage in leadership, strategy, and interpersonal communication, which are less susceptible to cognitive AI disruption. While some administrative tasks may be assisted by AI, the core responsibilities involve decision-making and human interaction, limiting the overall impact of AI on their daily work.

title: Judges
exposure_rationale: Judges primarily engage in legal reasoning, decision-making, and interpersonal communication, which are not easily replaced by AI. While AI may assist with legal research and document review, the core tasks of interpreting the law and delivering justice require human judgment and presence, limiting the cognitive AI exposure.

title: Lawyers and Quebec notaries
exposure_rationale: Lawyers and Quebec notaries engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal communication, where AI can assist with legal research, document drafting, and case analysis. However, the need for human judgment, client interaction, and courtroom presence limits the extent to which AI can fully replace or reshape their core tasks.

title: University professors and lecturers
education_req: A doctoral degree in the field of specialization is required for university professors.
A master's degree in the field of specialization is required for university lecturers.

Licences or professional certification may be required for professors teaching future practitioners in certain professionally regulated fields, such as medicine, engineering, architecture, psychology or law.
exposure_rationale: University professors and lecturers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal interaction, primarily involving teaching, research, and mentoring. While AI can assist in administrative tasks and provide educational resources, the core functions of teaching and fostering student relationships still require significant human presence and judgment, resulting in moderate AI exposure.

title: Post-secondary teaching and research assistants
education_req: Enrolment in, or completion of, a university or college program is required.
exposure_rationale: Post-secondary teaching and research assistants engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as assisting in teaching, conducting research, and supporting students. While AI can assist with information processing and data analysis, the role still requires significant human interaction and judgment, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: College and other vocational instructors
education_req: A bachelor's degree, a college diploma or demonstrated expertise in the field of instruction is required.
A master's degree in the field of instruction may be required.
A certificate, diploma or degree in adult education may be required.
exposure_rationale: College and vocational instructors engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal interaction, primarily focused on teaching and facilitating learning. While AI can assist with administrative tasks and provide educational resources, the core of their work—direct instruction and mentorship—requires human presence and judgment, limiting overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Secondary school teachers
education_req: Teachers of academic subjects require a bachelor's degree in education which is often preceded by a bachelor's degree in the arts or sciences.
Teachers of vocational or technical subjects require a bachelor's degree in education which is usually preceded by specialized training or experience in the subject.
Instructors of trades in Quebec require completion of an apprenticeship training program and industry or trade certification.
exposure_rationale: Secondary school teachers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, with significant reliance on human judgment and relationships in the classroom. While AI can assist with administrative tasks and provide educational resources, the core teaching role requires physical presence and personal engagement, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Elementary school and kindergarten teachers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in education is required.
A bachelor's degree in child development may be required.
Additional training is required to specialize in special education or second language instruction.
exposure_rationale: Elementary school and kindergarten teachers primarily engage in interpersonal work, focusing on teaching and nurturing students, which requires a significant human presence. While AI can assist with administrative tasks and provide educational resources, the core of teaching involves human interaction, emotional intelligence, and adaptability that AI cannot fully replicate.

title: Social workers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in social work is required in Newfoundland and Labrador, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island, New Brunswick, Quebec, Ontario, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, British Columbia, the Northwest Territories and Nunavut.
In Alberta, a bachelor's degree or diploma in social work is required.
Supervised practical experience is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Social workers engage in a blend of interpersonal and knowledge work, primarily involving direct human interaction and support. While AI can assist with administrative tasks and data management, the core responsibilities of social work—such as counseling, advocacy, and relationship-building—require a human presence and judgment, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Therapists in counselling and related specialized therapies
education_req: A bachelor's or a master's degree in the field of counselling, therapy, mental health, psychology or a related social service discipline is required and a period of supervised clinical work with clients may be required.
A master’s degree in the field of therapy is required for art therapist, music therapist, and dance therapists.
Membership with a provincial or federal association is usually required by employers.
exposure_rationale: Therapists in counselling and related specialized therapies primarily engage in interpersonal work that requires human judgment, empathy, and emotional intelligence, which limits the potential for cognitive AI to fully replace their roles. While AI can assist with administrative tasks or provide supplementary resources, the core of therapy relies on human interaction and nuanced understanding, keeping AI exposure at a moderate level.

title: Religious leaders
education_req: Completion of college, university or other program in religious studies is usually required. Some occupations in this unit group may require a master’s of divinity or theology.
A period of study with a senior minister is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Religious leaders primarily engage in interpersonal work, providing guidance, support, and community services that require a physical presence and human interaction. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or communication, the core responsibilities of this occupation are deeply rooted in personal relationships and spiritual leadership, limiting the impact of cognitive AI.

title: Police investigators and other investigative occupations
exposure_rationale: Police investigators engage in a blend of investigative work that includes analyzing evidence, interviewing witnesses, and making judgments based on human interactions. While AI can assist with data analysis and case management, the core tasks require significant human presence and interpersonal skills, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Probation and parole officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in social work, criminology, psychology, sociology or other related social science discipline is required.
A master's degree in social work, criminology, psychology or other related social science discipline may be required.
exposure_rationale: Probation and parole officers engage in a blend of interpersonal and knowledge work, including monitoring offenders, conducting assessments, and facilitating rehabilitation programs. While AI could assist with data management and reporting tasks, the core responsibilities require human judgment, empathy, and direct interaction, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Educational counsellors
education_req: A bachelor's degree in counselling, career development, education or social sciences is required for counsellors in school settings.
A master's degree in counselling psychology or a related field such as educational psychology, developmental psychology or social work is usually required.
Educational counsellors in post-secondary settings require an undergraduate degree and may require a graduate degree. A particular academic specialization may also be required.
exposure_rationale: Educational counsellors engage in a blend of interpersonal and knowledge work, primarily involving direct communication with students and stakeholders. While AI can assist in administrative tasks and data analysis, the core of their role relies on human judgment, empathy, and relationship-building, which limits the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Career development practitioners and career counsellors (except education)
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in employment counselling, career development or in a related field, such as human resources development, psychology, education or social services is required.
A master's degree in counselling psychology or a related field such as educational psychology, developmental psychology or social work may be required.
Vocational rehabilitation professional certification may be required by employers.
exposure_rationale: Career development practitioners and career counsellors engage in a blend of interpersonal communication and knowledge work, providing guidance and support to clients. While AI can assist with administrative tasks and data analysis, the core of the job relies heavily on human interaction, empathy, and personalized advice, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Natural and applied science policy researchers, consultants and program officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in a related scientific or technical discipline is usually required for occupations in this unit group.
A master's degree in a related scientific discipline may be required.

Certification through the Canadian College of Certified Professional Ergonomists is required to use the title Canadian Certified Professional Ergonomist (CCPE). Membership with the Association of Canadian Ergonomists may be required.
exposure_rationale: Natural and applied science policy researchers, consultants, and program officers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as analyzing data, developing policies, and consulting with stakeholders. While AI can assist with data analysis and report generation, the need for human judgment, relationship-building, and contextual understanding in policy-making limits the overall cognitive AI exposure of this occupation.

title: Economists and economic policy researchers and analysts
education_req: A master's degree in economics or in a related discipline such as business administration or statistics is usually required.
A doctorate in economics may be required.
exposure_rationale: Economists and economic policy researchers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing data, interpreting economic trends, and formulating policy recommendations. While AI can assist in data analysis and report generation, the role still requires significant human judgment, critical thinking, and interpersonal communication, which limits its exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Business development officers and market researchers and analysts
education_req: A bachelor's degree in economics, commerce, business administration or public administration is required.
Certification as a certified economic developer (Ec.D.) may be required.
Certification as a Certified Marketing Research Professional (CMRP) may be required.
exposure_rationale: Business development officers and market researchers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, such as analyzing market trends and developing client relationships. While AI can assist with data analysis and market research, the need for human judgment and relationship-building in business development limits the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Social policy researchers, consultants and program officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in a social science or related discipline, or in business administration is usually required.
A master's degree in a social science or related discipline or in business administration may be required.
Home economists require a bachelor's degree in home economics, home economics education, human ecology, nutrition and food sciences or family and consumer studies.
exposure_rationale: Social policy researchers, consultants, and program officers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as analyzing data, writing reports, and collaborating with stakeholders. While AI can assist in data analysis and report generation, the need for human judgment, relationship-building, and understanding complex social issues limits the overall cognitive AI exposure of this occupation.

title: Health policy researchers, consultants and program officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in health science, public administration, recreation administration or hospital administration, or a bachelor's degree in social science, is required.
A graduate degree in health, social science or an administrative discipline may be required.
Several years of experience in the health field as a health care professional or as a community or social service worker are usually required.
exposure_rationale: Health policy researchers, consultants, and program officers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as analyzing data, developing policies, and collaborating with stakeholders. While AI can assist in data analysis and report generation, the role still heavily relies on human judgment, relationship-building, and contextual understanding, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Education policy researchers, consultants and program officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in education or in a discipline such as social science or business administration is required.
A master's degree in education may be required.
Specialized training or certification may be required.
exposure_rationale: Education policy researchers, consultants, and program officers engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as analyzing data, developing policies, and collaborating with stakeholders. While AI can assist with data analysis and information processing, the need for human judgment, relationship-building, and contextual understanding in education policy limits the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Recreation, sports and fitness policy researchers, consultants and program officers
education_req: A university degree in recreation administration, sports administration, physical education, kinesiology or related discipline combined with some work experience in a related field or a college diploma in a recreation, sports or fitness program combined with some experience in a related field is required.

Recreation, sports and fitness program supervisors require experience as program leaders or instructors in recreation, sports and fitness. Certification in program specialization, such as fitness or lifesaving, may also be required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, such as policy research and program development, which may be supported by AI tools for data analysis and report generation. However, the need for human judgment, relationship-building, and community engagement limits the extent to which cognitive AI can fully replace or significantly reshape the core tasks of these roles.

title: Program officers unique to government
exposure_rationale: Program officers unique to government engage in a blend of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as policy analysis, program evaluation, and community engagement. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and interaction, limiting its overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Other professional occupations in social science
education_req: A master's or doctoral degree in the discipline is usually required.
In Quebec, membership in the regulatory body for criminologists is required to use the title “Criminologist”.
exposure_rationale: The occupation involves a blend of interpersonal work and knowledge tasks, such as social work and community services, which require human judgment and relationship-building. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core functions still rely heavily on human presence and interaction, limiting overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Police officers (except commissioned)
exposure_rationale: Police officers engage in a mix of physical presence, community interaction, and information processing tasks, such as report writing and data analysis. While AI can assist in areas like data management and predictive policing, the core responsibilities of policing require human judgment, interpersonal skills, and real-time decision-making, limiting overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Firefighters
exposure_rationale: Firefighters primarily engage in physical and interpersonal work, responding to emergencies and performing rescue operations, which limits the impact of cognitive AI on their core tasks. While AI may assist with scheduling or data management, the essential nature of firefighting requires human presence and decision-making in unpredictable environments.

title: Specialized members of the Canadian Armed Forces
exposure_rationale: Specialized members of the Canadian Armed Forces engage in roles that involve significant interpersonal interaction and physical presence, such as law enforcement and community services. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or data analysis, the core functions of these roles rely heavily on human judgment, relationships, and real-time decision-making, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Paralegals and related occupations
education_req: Paralegals in law firms require a bachelor's degree in law or a law college diploma and in-house training from a law firm or other legal establishment.

Paralegals require a licence to perform advanced legal services.
exposure_rationale: Paralegals primarily engage in knowledge work that involves legal research, document preparation, and client communication, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While some tasks require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the digital nature of much of their work means that AI can provide substantial productivity gains, leading to a high level of exposure to cognitive AI.

title: Social and community service workers
education_req: Completion of a college or university program in social work, child and youth care, psychology or other social science or health-related discipline is usually required.
Previous work experience in a social service environment as a volunteer or in a support capacity may replace formal education requirements for some occupations in this unit group.
Social service workers may be required to be a member of a provincial regulatory body in some provinces.
exposure_rationale: Social and community service workers engage in a blend of interpersonal and knowledge work, often requiring human judgment and emotional intelligence in their roles. While AI can assist with administrative tasks and data management, the core functions of providing support and building relationships with clients necessitate a human presence, limiting the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Early childhood educators and assistants
education_req: Early childhood educators
Completion of a two- to four-year college program in early childhood education or a bachelor's degree in child development is required.

Licensing is required in Ontario and certification is required in British Columbia for early childhood educators. Licensing for early childhood educators is usually required in all other provinces and territories.
exposure_rationale: Early childhood educators and assistants primarily engage in interpersonal work, focusing on the development and care of young children, which requires physical presence and human interaction. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or educational resources, the core responsibilities of nurturing and teaching cannot be effectively replaced by AI, resulting in low cognitive AI exposure.

title: Instructors of persons with disabilities

While AI may assist with administrative tasks or resource management, the core functions of this occupation rely heavily on personal interaction and individualized instruction, limiting the impact of cognitive AI.

title: Religion workers
education_req: Completion of college, university or other program in religious studies may be required, depending on the particular occupation and religion.
There may be other employment requirements depending on the particular occupation and religion.
exposure_rationale: Religion workers primarily engage in interpersonal and community-focused roles that involve significant human interaction and emotional support, which limits the impact of cognitive AI. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or scheduling, the core functions of providing spiritual guidance and community support are inherently human-centric and cannot be easily automated.

title: Elementary and secondary school teacher assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Teacher assistants usually require completion of a 10-month college program in teaching assistance, educational assistance or other social science program.
Teacher assistants who help students with special needs usually require specialized training and experience.

While AI may assist with administrative tasks or educational tools, the core responsibilities of providing direct support and interaction with students limit the overall cognitive AI exposure.

title: Other instructors
education_req: Enrollment in or completion of post-secondary school in a related discipline may be required for tutors, secondary and elementary school subjects.
